description_long: This is a standard regulatory stop sign with an octagonal shape and a bright red face, featuring the word 'ALTO' in bold white uppercase letters, indicating its use in Spanish-speaking regions. The sign is bordered by a thin white outline, enhancing its visibility. It is mounted on a tall, slender, metallic pole that is typically embedded into the ground for stability. The back of the sign is plain and gray, with the pole visibly attached at the center. The sign's surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a reflective coating for nighttime visibility. The overall construction is robust, designed to withstand outdoor urban environments and weather conditions.
description: A red octagonal stop sign with 'ALTO' in white letters, mounted on a tall metallic pole. The sign has a white border and a reflective, smooth surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red octagonal sign with 'ALTO' in white, bordered by a white outline and mounted on a gray pole.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the sign and pole, with minimal visible detail except the edge of the sign.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain gray back of the octagonal sign and the central attachment of the pole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim edge of the sign and pole.
